metadata.purpose: Three-part output format specification for manufacturing cost analysis

output_structure.description: Cost analysis responses use a three-part format when applicable

parts.name: BOM Cost Explosion Tree
parts.when: Any tool involving BOM structure or cost breakdown

parts.name: Variance Dashboard
parts.when: Any tool comparing standard vs actual costs

parts.name: Key Findings
parts.when: Always — every cost analysis ends with actionable findings

bom_tree_format.description: Indented hierarchical tree showing BOM explosion with costs at each level

variance_dashboard_format.description: Markdown table comparing standard vs actual with variance columns
example: | Category | Standard | Actual | Variance | Var % | Status |

key_findings_format.description: Numbered list of actionable insights, prioritized by impact
example: 1. **Material cost overrun of 4.9%** — Steel Sheet actual price ($2.75) exceeds standard ($2.50). Review supplier pricing or update standard cost.
2. **Labor efficiency loss of 7.5%** — Work Center WC-01 ran 15 minutes over planned time. Investigate bottleneck.
3. **Favorable paint cost** — Paint running 5% below standard ($7.60 vs $8.00). Consider locking in supplier contract.
4. **Scrap rate 2.1%** — 2 units scrapped from batch of 95. Within acceptable range (<5%).
5. **Recommendation**: Update standard cost for Steel Sheet to reflect current market pricing ($2.75).

summary.bom_tree: Top level only — show direct components with totals, no sub-component breakdown
summary.variance_dashboard: Total row only — no per-category breakdown (Materials/Labor/Overhead)
summary.key_findings: Max 3 items. Plain English, no accounting jargon. Focus on dollar impact and recommendations.
summary.when_to_use: Quick overview, executive summary, chat conversations

detailed.bom_tree: Full explosion to raw materials with subtotals at each level
detailed.variance_dashboard: Full table with Materials, Labor, Overhead rows + Total row
detailed.key_findings: Max 5 items. Mixed plain English + financial terms. Include variance percentages.
detailed.when_to_use: Standard cost analysis, production review meetings, management reports

technical.bom_tree: Full explosion with per-component variance annotations and Odoo record IDs
technical.variance_dashboard: Full table + per-component material variance sub-table + per-work-center labor variance sub-table
technical.key_findings: Max 5 items. Full accounting terminology with GL account references. Include price/quantity/rate/efficiency breakdown.
technical.when_to_use: Cost accounting audit, ERP reconciliation, variance investigation
